title: Piquant Kenyan Lentil Burger
description: A flavorful and nutritious Kenyan-inspired lentil burger served in a molcajete, perfect for a post-workout meal, featuring sesame seed burger buns and a variety of umami flavors
instructions: Rinse the lentils and soak them in water for 30 minutes, then drain and set aside
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the onion, garlic, and ginger until softened
Add the kenyan spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Add the lentils, tomato, and cucumber, and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then stir in the coriander leaves and lemon juice
Toast the sesame seed burger buns by grilling them for 2 minutes on each side
Assemble the burgers by spooning the lentil mixture onto the buns
Serve the burgers in a molcajete and garnish with additional coriander leaves if desired
Fry the burgers in a little oil until crispy and golden brown, if desired
